Title: OpenClaw has SSRF guard bypass via IPv6 transition over ISATAP
Description: OpenClaw's SSRF hostname/IP guard did not detect ISATAP embedded IPv4 addresses (`...:5efe:w.x.y.z`). A crafted URL containing an ISATAP IPv6 literal could embed a private IPv4 target (for example loopback) and bypass private-address filtering in URL-fetching paths.
NotImpacted: All versions before 2026.1.20, all versions starting from 2026.2.19
